name: Minimal Surface Soap Iridescence
description: Parametric minimal surfaces morphing between catenoid and helicoid via Bonnet rotation. Thin-film interference produces rainbow soap-film colors based on optical path length and mean curvature, with HDR caustics and subsurface scattering.

params.name: Bonnet Rotation
params.description: Controls the overall strength of the generated effect.

params.name: Surface Tension
params.description: Controls animation and temporal evolution speed.

params.name: Y Rotation
params.description: Controls spatial scale, frequency, or detail contrast.

params.name: Caustic Glow
params.description: Controls mouse-driven or secondary variation influence.
